# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

This upgrade migrates the StoreFx ASP.NET Framework application to modern .NET using a side-by-side approach. Work starts with prerequisites, then scaffolding a new ASP.NET Core host, followed by incremental migration and final validation.

**Progress**: 0/4 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

## Tasks

- 🔄 01-prerequisites: Validate upgrade toolchain and migration prerequisites ([Content](tasks/01-prerequisites/task.md))
- 🔲 02-scaffold-storefx-core: Scaffold ASP.NET Core side-by-side host for StoreFx
- 🔲 03-migrate-storefx-web-assets: Migrate StoreFx web assets and dependencies incrementally
- 🔲 04-final-validation: Validate upgraded solution and capture post-upgrade actions
